Name: Bewitch
Description: After this attack has been resolved, take control of target living enemy non-Leader warrior model hit by this attack. You can immediately make a full advance with the enemy model followed by a basic attack, then Bewitch expires. A model can be affected by Bewitch only once per turn.

Name: Rum & Grapeshot
Description: Friendly warrior models in Foulblood’s control range with Stumbling Drunk gain +3 ARM and Tough. When a model is pushed as a result of Stumbling Drunk you can choose the direction it is pushed. Rum and Grapeshot lasts for one round.

Name: Stumbling Drunk
Description: This model cannot become knocked down. If it is hit by an enemy attack at any time except while it is advancing, after the attack is resolved a model with Stumbling Drunk is pushed d3" directly away from the attacking model.

Name: Open Bar
Description: While within 10" of this model, friendly living Faction models with a large or smaller base gain Stumbling Drunk.

Name: Monkey Bite
Description: While in melee with this model, living enemy models suffer −2 to melee attack rolls.

Name: Unstoppable
Description: This model does not have to forfeit its Combat Action when it advances or is placed out of one or more enemy models’ melee ranges during its Normal Movement.

Name: Trample Power Attack
Description: This model can make Trample power attacks.

Name: Slam Power Attack
Description: This model can make Slam power attacks.

Name: Headbutt Power Attack
Description: This model can make Headbutt power attacks.

Name: Amphibious
Description: This model treats shallow water as open terrain while advancing. While completely in shallow water, this model gains concealment and does not block line of sight.

Name: Foul Stench
Description: While within 5" of this model, living enemy warbeasts suffer -1 FURY and THR.

Name: Regeneration
Description: This model can be forced to remove X damage points once per activation. This model cannot use Regeneration during an activation it runs.

Name: Reposition
Description: At the end of this model/unit's activation in which it did not run or fail a charge, this model can advance up to X, then its activation ends.

Name: Snacking
Description: When this model boxes a living model with a melee attack, it can choose to remove the boxed model from play. When it does, this model can remove d3 damage points.

Name: Critical Consume
Description: On a critical hit, if the attack hit a small-based non-Leader model the model hit is removed from play.

Name: Grievous Wounds
Description: On a direct hit, a model hit by this weapon loses Tough and cannot have damage removed from it for one round.

Name: Warhead
Description: When this model directly hits an extra- large based model or smaller with an attack with this weapon, enemy models within 2" of the model hit suffer an unboostable POW 10 blast damage roll. This damage is not considered to have been caused by an attack.

Name: Man Catcher
Description: A warrior model hit by this attack suffers -2 DEF and cannot advance while within this model's melee range for one round.

Name: Tough
Description: When this model is disabled, roll a d6. On a 5 or 6, remove 1 damage point from this model; it is no longer disabled and becomes knocked down. While knocked down, this model loses Tough.

Name: Pathfinder
Description: This model treats rough terrain as open terrain while advancing. While charging, slam power attacking, or trample power attacking, this model does not stop its movement when it contacts an obstacle.

Name: Clear!
Description: This model's ranged attacks against friendly models automatically miss.

Name: Iron Sentinel
Description: While B2B with a friendly Faction Cohort model, this model gains +2 DEF and ARM and cannot become knocked down.

Name: Monster Hunter
Description: When this model hits a warbeast with an attack, the warbeast suffers d3 + 3 points of damage to the branch of your choice.

Name: Overwhelming Recoil
Description: After an attack with this weapon is resolved, center a cloud effect on this model, then push this model d3+1" directly away from the model targeted.

Name: Thunderbolt
Description: Enemy models hit are pushed d3" directly away from the attacking model. On a critical hit, the enemy model becomes knocked down after being pushed.

Name: Flight
Description:
This model can fly. A flying model treats all non-impassable terrain as open terrain while advancing. It can move through obstructions and other models if it has enough movement to move completely past them.

While charging, slam power attacking, or trample power attacking, this model does not stop its movement when it contacts an obstacle, an obstruction, or another model. This model ignores intervening models when declaring a charge target.

While knocked down or stationary, a model loses flight.

Name: Advance Deployment
Description: This model can be deployed after normal deployment, up to 3˝ beyond the established deployment zone.

Name: Albatross
Description: If this model is destroyed by an enemy attack, for the rest of this turn enemy models suffer -1 to their attack and damage rolls.

Name: Annoyance
Description: Living enemy models within 1" of this model suffer -1 to attack rolls.

Name: Fiery Blast
Description: When this model is destroyed, models within 2" of it suffer a POW 14 blast fire damage roll.

Name: Flying High
Description: Ranged attacks targeting this model suffer -3 RNG. Friendly models can advance through this model if they have enough movement to move completely past its base. This model loses Flying High if it loses Flight.

Name: Sky-Dropped
Description: Attacks with this weapon ignore cover. Models with Flight do not suffer blast damage from this attack.

Name: Assault
Description:
This model can make an Assault ranged attack.

An independent model with the Assault advantage can make one ranged attack as part of a successful charge during its activation. The model with Assault makes this ranged attack after the model ends its movement but before it begins its Combat Action. This attack must target the model charged.

When a unit charges during its activation, on a successful charge after resolving its Normal Movement but before beginning the unit’s Combat Actions, each trooper model in the unit with the Assault advantage that did not forfeit its Combat Action can make one ranged attack targeting an enemy model it is engaging.

When resolving an Assault ranged attack, ignore the target in melee penalty.

Name: Brutal Charge
Description: This model gains +2 to charge attack damage rolls with this weapon.

Name: Sanguine Bond
Description: When this model would suffer damage from an enemy attack, you can choose one or more models in its unit to suffer any amount of that damage instead, divided as you choose. If you do, this model does not suffer that damage. A model cannot suffer more damage as a result of Sanguine Bond than it has unmarked damage boxes.

Name: Set Defense
Description: Models suffer -2 on charge and slam power attack rolls against this model.

Name: Unbreakable Wall
Description: This model gains a cumulative +3 ARM for each other model in this unit it is currently B2B with. Additionally, while B2B with another model in its unit, this model cannot become knocked down, cannot be placed outside Normal Movement, and cannot be moved by a push, slam, or throw.

Name: Snap Fire
Description: When this model destroys one or more enemy models with a ranged attack with this weapon during its Combat Action, immediately after that attack is resolved this model can make one basic ranged attack with this weapon. Attacks gained from Snap Fire cannot generate additional attacks from Snap Fire.

Name: Damage Type: Magical
Description: This weapon causes magical damage.

Name: Critical Armor-Piercing
Description: On a critical hit, when calculating damage from this weapon, halve the base ARM stats of the model hit.

Name: Freeze
Description: A model hit by this weapon becomes stationary for one round unless it has Resistance: Cold.

Name: Bulldoze
Description: Ehen this model is B2B with an enemy model during its Normal Movement, it can push that model up to 2" directly away from it. A model can be pushed by Bulldoze only once per turn. Bulldoze has no effect when this model makes a trample power attack.

Name: Hyper-Aggressive
Description: When this model suffers damage from an enemy attack, after the attack is resolved it can immediatly make a full advance directly toward the attacking model.

Name: Leadership [Man-O-War]
Description: Other friendly Faction Man-O-War models beginning their activation withing 10" of this model gain +2 SPD for one turn.

Name: Repairable
Description: This model can be targeted with Repair special actions as if it were a construct model.

Name: Steady
Description: This model cannot become knocked down.

Name: Sturdy
Description: This model cannot be pushed.

Name: Fortunes of War
Description: While in Sikora´s control range, friendly Faction models gain Unyielding. Additionaly, while in Sikora´s control range, friendly Faction models can be rerolled  only once as a result of Fortunes of War. Fortunes of War las for one round. (A model with Unyielding gains +2 ARM against melee damage rolls.)

Name: Fleet
Description: Once per activation, this model can spend 1 focus point to gain +2 SPD that activation.

Name: Follow Up
Description: When this model sams an enemy model, immediately after the slam is resolved this model can advance directly toward the slammed model, up to the distance the slammed model was moved.

Name: Grand Slam
Description: This model can make slam power attacks without spending a focus point. Models slammed by this model are moved an additional 2".

Name: Gladiator
Description: This model gains +2 on power attack damage rolls and on power attack collateral damage rolls.

Name: Construct
Description: This model is a construct and is not a living model.

Name: Brutal Damage
Description: On a direct hit, gain an additional die on this weapon´s damage rolls against the target directly hit.

Name: Skewer
Description: When this weapon damages an enemy model with an equal or smaller base, immediatly after the attack is resolved the damaged model can be pushed directly toward this model until it contact a model, an obstacle, or an obstruction.

Name: Tune Up
Description: RNG 1. Target friendly Faction Cohort model. If the Cohort model is in range, it immeadiatly stands up and is no longer stationary, continuous effects on the model expire, and ir gains Pathfinder for one turn.

Name: Veteran Leader [Man-O-War]
Description: While withing 10" of this model, other friendly Man-O-War models gain +1 to attack rolls.

Name: Resistance: Blast
Description: When this model suffers a blast damage roll, remove one die from the damage roll.

Name: Dual Attack
Description: This model can make melee and ranged attacks in the same activation. When this model makes its initial melee attacks, it can also make its initial ranged attacks. This model cannot make ranged attacks after making a power attack.

Name: Vengeance
Description: During your Maintenance Phase, if one or more models in this unit were damaged by an enemy attacks during the last round, each model in the unit can make a Vengeance Move. Each model making a Vengeance Move can advance 3". After all models in the unit have moved, each model can then make one basic melee attack. A model can only make one Vengeance Move each turn.

Name: Critical Shred
Description: On a critical hit with this weapon during this model´s Combat Action, after the attack is resolved this model can make one additional attack with this weapon against the model hit.

Name: Smite
Description: The model hit is slammed d6" directly away from this model. If the model hit has a larger base than the attacking model it is moved only half the distance rolled. The POW of collateral damage is equal to the POW of this weapon.

Name: Buckler
Description: This weapon has an integral buckler that gives the model a cumulative +1 ARM bonus; for example, a model with two of them gains a bonus of +2 ARM. A model does not gain this bonus while the weapon system with the buckler is crippled.
